Company description
Boswa Energy is a major local group of energy and petrochemical companies. Our
aim is to meet the energy needs of society, in ways that are economically, socially
and environmentally viable, now and in the future. Boswa has played an important
role in the country, not only as a premier oil company, but also as a committed
corporate citizen and change agent.
